LayoutNode.description: Layout node: structural (Section, Row, Tabs, Tab) or data-bound (Field, DataTable with optional dataSourceId/operationId).

StructuralLayoutNode.description: Layout-only nodes: Section, Row, Tabs, Tab. No data source; each type has explicit properties.

visibleFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node visible when viewport >= this breakpoint.

hiddenFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node hidden when viewport >= this breakpoint.

columns.description: Number of columns or column layout.

visibleFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node visible when viewport >= this breakpoint.

hiddenFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node hidden when viewport >= this breakpoint.

visibleFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node visible when viewport >= this breakpoint.

hiddenFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node hidden when viewport >= this breakpoint.

visibleFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node visible when viewport >= this breakpoint.

hiddenFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node hidden when viewport >= this breakpoint.

DataBoundLayoutNode.description: Field or DataTable; each type has explicit properties; may reference dataSourceId/operationId.

FieldNode.description: Field: either a basic input (no data source) or Autocomplete (requires data source).

FieldNodeInput.description: Field with basic HTML-style input; no data source. When required is omitted, runtime derives from entity property.

componentId.description: Basic input components; do not use a data source.

required.description: When true, field is mandatory on this form; when omitted, derive from entity property.

label.description: Fallback label when labelKey not used or missing translation.

placeholder.description: Fallback placeholder when placeholderKey not used.

validation.description: Form-level validation rules for this field (in addition to entity property validation).

dateFormat.description: Hint for date display/input; runtime resolves with locale. Use with DatePicker.

numberFormat.description: Hint for number display/input; runtime resolves with locale. Use with NumberInput.

visibleFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node visible when viewport >= this breakpoint.

hiddenFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node hidden when viewport >= this breakpoint.

FieldNodeAutocomplete.description: Field with Autocomplete component; requires a data source operation. When required is omitted, runtime derives from entity property.

operationId.description: Operation (e.g. list or autocomplete-search) on that data source.

required.description: When true, field is mandatory on this form; when omitted, derive from entity property.

label.description: Fallback label when labelKey not used or missing translation.

placeholder.description: Fallback placeholder when placeholderKey not used.

validation.description: Form-level validation rules for this field (in addition to entity property validation).

visibleFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node visible when viewport >= this breakpoint.

hiddenFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node hidden when viewport >= this breakpoint.

DataTableNode.description: Data table (entity relation or data-source-backed); explicit properties only.

field.description: Entity relation property when bound to entity (e.g. list of related records).

visibleFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node visible when viewport >= this breakpoint.

hiddenFrom.description: Breakpoint id; node hidden when viewport >= this breakpoint.
